parameters.query: SELECT l.*, ARRAY(SELECT c.company_name FROM public.companies c WHERE c.id = ANY(l.competitor_ids)) AS resolved_competitor_names FROM launch.launches l WHERE l.id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid AND l.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid;

SELECT s.id, s.signal_type, s.company_name, s.title, s.summary, s.created_at FROM control_plane.signals s WHERE s.user_id = '{{ $('Validate Payload').first().json.user_id }}'::uuid AND s.company_name = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.competitor_names ? $json.competitor_names.map(n => "'" + n.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') : "''" }}]) AND s.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT 50;

UPDATE launch.launches SET initial_messaging = '{{ $json.initial_messaging }}'::jsonb, initial_positioning = '{{ $json.initial_positioning }}'::jsonb, readiness_score = {{ $json.readiness_score }}, readiness_breakdown = '{{ $json.readiness_breakdown }}'::jsonb, updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, launch_id: $('Validate Payload').first().json.launch_id, readiness_score: $('Build Initial State').first().json.readiness_score }) }}
